ddls:
CREATE TABLE "entities" (
  "entity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each entity */,
  "local_authority_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the local authority that manages the entity */,
  "same_entity_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the same entity in another record (for entity resolution) */,
  "uri_entity" TEXT /* URI of the entity in an external data source */,
  "entity_class" TEXT /* Class of the entity (e.g., Person, Organization) */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the entity data */,
  "query_source_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the query used to fetch the entity data */,
  "entity_std_name" TEXT /* Standard name of the entity */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the entity */,
  "timestmp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the entity record */,
  "entity_label" TEXT /* Human-readable label or name for the entity */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the entity */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of an image associated with the entity */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the entity */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the entity was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the entity */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the entity was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("entity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_entities_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_entities_query_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("query_source_id") REFERENCES queries ("query_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_entities_same_entity_id FOREIGN KEY ("same_entity_id") REFERENCES entities ("entity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_entities_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_entities_local_authority_id FOREIGN KEY ("local_authority_id") REFERENCES local_authorities ("local_authority_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "local_authorities" (
  "local_authority_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each local authority */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the local authority */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the local authority */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the local authority */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the local authority */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the local authority */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("local_authority_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "entity_classes" (
  "class_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each entity class */,
  "class_name" TEXT /* Name of the entity class */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the entity class */,
  "parent_class_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent entity class */,
  "class_type" TEXT /* Type of entity class (e.g., person, organization, resource) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("class_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "source_url" TEXT /* URL of the data source */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  "source_type" TEXT /* Type of data source (e.g., database, API, file) */,
  "authentication_method" TEXT /* Authentication method used to access the data source (e.g., username/password, API key) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "queries" (
  "query_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each query */,
  "query_text" TEXT /* Text of the query used to fetch data */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data source from which the query is executed */,
  "last_executed" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last execution of the query */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the query */,
  "query_parameters" TEXT /* Parameters used in the query */,
  "query_result" TEXT /* Result of the query */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("query_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_queries_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data scientist, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "last_login_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "entity_id" INTEGER /* ID of the entity being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the entity */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the entity was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, update, delete) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the access event */,
  "access_ip" TEXT /* IP address from which the entity was accessed */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the browser or client used to access the entity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_entity_id FOREIGN KEY ("entity_id") REFERENCES entities ("entity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
